PLAYA HERMOSA · COSTA RICA

Your Perfect Beach Wedding

Create unforgettable memories in paradise

Weddings at Terraza del Pacifico

Where Your Forever Begins on the Shores of Paradise

Imagine exchanging vows with the Pacific Ocean as your backdrop, golden sunlight reflecting off the waves, and the warm tropical breeze carrying the sound of the sea through your ceremony.

At Terraza del Pacifico, weddings are more than events—they are once-in-a-lifetime experiences thoughtfully designed to bring your dream celebration to life. Nestled directly on the pristine shores of Playa Hermosa, our beachfront resort offers an unforgettable setting where lush tropical gardens, breathtaking sunsets, oceanfront dining, and authentic Costa Rican beauty come together to create a wedding unlike any other.

From intimate beachfront ceremonies to elegant receptions beneath the stars, our dedicated team works closely with every couple to ensure every detail is flawlessly executed. As the sun sets over the Pacific and the sky transforms into shades of gold, pink, and crimson, you'll create memories that will last far beyond your wedding day. Because the most important day of your life deserves one of the most beautiful settings on Earth.

Your Love Story Begins Here.

Quote Your Wedding
Our Venues

Every corner of Terraza del Pacífico is a perfect setting for your love story

01

Beachfront Garden

Exchange vows in our tropical garden directly facing the Pacific Ocean. White chairs, rose petals, and the sound of waves as background music create a dream ceremony.

02

Evening Ceremony

Beneath Costa Rican stars, with professional lighting and a floral arch as backdrop, evening ceremonies at Terraza create an intimate and unforgettable atmosphere.

03

Vivace Terrace

The perfect beachfront reception. Enjoy a gourmet dinner by Chef Luigi as the sun sets over the Pacific. String lights, tropical breeze, and Mediterranean cuisine.

04

Starlit Pool

Unique in Central America, our pool with 1,200 LED lights creates a starry sky beneath the water. The ideal space for a welcome cocktail or the most memorable reception of your life.
